person.name: Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT

nameForms.fullText: Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT

parent.name: Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT

sibling.name: Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT於1040年出生時，他的父親Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT16歲，母親Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU15歲。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT于1040年出生时，他的父亲Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT16岁，母亲Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU15岁。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: GWENT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Gent .

variants.name: Gent
meanings: English (northern) and French: nickname from Old French gent, Middle English gent(e) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’, also ‘nice, friendly’.
English: habitational name from Ghent (Gent in Dutch), a city in Flanders, Belgium. Compare Ghent .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with gand ‘spell’, such as Gandolf.

variants.name: Ghant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ghent  , a habitational name for someone from Ghent in Flanders. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ynyr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: pronounced ‘inn-eer’, probably from the Latin name Honorius (a derivative of honor ‘renown’).

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT was born in 1040, his father, Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT, was 16 and his mother, Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, was 15. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT est né en 1040, son père, Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT 1040 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT 16 und seine Mutter Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU 15. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT è nato il nel 1040, il suo padre, Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENTが1040年に生まれた時，父Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENTは16歳，母Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRUは15歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT(이)가 1040년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU(은)는 15세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT nasceu em 1040, seu pai, Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT родился в 1040 г., его отцу по имени Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, 15. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ynyr Fychan Ap Meurig de GWENT nació en 1040, su papá, Meurig Ap Ynyr Gwent de GWENT, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Elen Verch Ednyfed de CYMRU, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
